summary: Set 027 Session 1: orchestrator e2e harness foundation. Built tmpdir-scoped fixture generator (real git repo + bare remote per test) and shipped the 3-session happy-path scenario plus the v0.1.1 register_session_start regression pin. 1 e2e + 2 fast-suite tests added. Cross-provider verification ($0.32, gpt-5-4) surfaced 1 Major + 2 Minor findings; all addressed in this session.

reason.specifics: Session 2 extends the Python harness with four additional scenarios (cancel/restore, force-close, worktree discovery, multiset sequential). Same orchestrator engine and depth profile; no provider switch warranted.
